P2: Escape LIKE wildcards in search inputs
description: app/professionals/page.tsx:37 and app/api/opdrachten/zoeken/route.ts:23-31 pass raw user input into ilike patterns without escaping % and _ wildcards. A user searching for '%_%' would match everything. Add a utility to escape LIKE special chars before interpolation: function escapeLike(s: string) { return s.replace(/[%_\\]/g, '\\$&'); }

title: Phase 2: Scraper Operations — Config, History, Health
description:
## Background
Phase 2 builds the operational layer on top of Phase 1's scraper pipeline. While Phase 1 hard-codes platform configs, Phase 2 makes everything dynamic and observable through database-driven scraper configs, scrape history tracking, health monitoring, cache revalidation, and REST API endpoints.

## Why This Matters
Without this phase, there's no way to manage scrapers without code changes, no visibility into scrape history, and no way for the Phase 4 UI to display operational data.

## Technical Approach
- Add scraper_configs and scrape_results tables to Drizzle schema
- Create Motia event steps: RecordScrapeResult, RevalidateCache
- Create 5 API route steps (GET configs, PATCH config, POST trigger, GET history, GET health)
- Modify MasterScrape to load active configs from DB
- Seed initial Striive config row

## Success Criteria
- All 5 API endpoints return correct data
- PATCH toggle prevents scraping on next cron run
- Manual trigger via POST works end-to-end
- ScrapeResults recorded for every run
- Health endpoint shows warning when >3 failures in 24h
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: all 11 tasks done, 25 tests passing, schema pushed to Neon

title: 2.1: Add scraper_configs + scrape_results tables
description: Add scraper_configs (platform UK, baseUrl, isActive, authConfigEncrypted, cronExpression, lastRunAt, lastRunStatus) and scrape_results (configId FK SET NULL, platform, runAt, durationMs, jobsFound, jobsNew, duplicates, status, errors jsonb) tables to src/db/schema.ts. Run drizzle-kit generate + push.
close_reason: Schema tables added: scraperConfigs + scrapeResults with indexes, FK, pushed to Neon

title: 2.10: Seed Striive scraper config
description: Insert initial scraper_configs row: platform striive, baseUrl https://striive.com/nl/opdrachten, isActive true.
close_reason: Seed script created and executed — Striive config in Neon

close_reason: 17 new tests passing (25 total) covering schemas, health logic, API validation
